metadata.name: Language Data Commons Schema Terms
metadata.description: This is a language data schema, in the style of the Schema.org schema. It is based on OLAC terms for use in the LDaCA project and is published at <https://w3id.org/ldac/terms>. This schema builds on Schema.org and is intended to be used with the Language Data Commons RO-Crate Profile: <https://w3id.org/ldac/profile>.
metadata.author: Unknown
